name: Morphous Teasel
motif: teasel seed head with purple ring and green stem
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible textural catalog system drawn from a wet meadow teasel seed head: taupe seed geometry, purple ring accents, green stem structure, damp meadow neutrals, and tactile catalog surfaces for searchable collections and dense reference views.
typography: Structured catalog English UI with crisp sans headings, compact metadata labels, measured numeric tables, and Japanese typography guidance for browsable indexes, filters, and collection detail pages.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, seed-head tile rhythm, bristle-like dividers, purple-ring focus states, damp meadow surfaces, and tactile shadows for dense catalog navigation.
